notes: A synthetic EDGAR full-submission header in machine-readable KEY: VALUE flat-file format (not standard prose or cover-page layout). All fields are present but in an unexpected machine format: FILING DATE as YYYYMMDD (20260228), PERIOD OF REPORT as YYYYMMDD (20251231), REGISTRANT as a plain string. Tests whether the extractor can successfully parse non-standard date formats and non-prose field presentation. Positive-assertion case: filer_name, form_type, filing_date, and period_fiscal_year_end should all be extractable despite the unusual format.
